task_completion.description: Read the SETI alert protocol file to identify the target and instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Documents/seti_alert_protocol.txt.

task_completion.description: Set the telescope to the correct target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Astronomy software (e.g., KStars/Ekos) showing the telescope pointed at KIC 8462852, or coordinates RA ~20h 06m (20.1043h) and Dec ~+44d 27m (44.4568d).

task_completion.description: Configure the camera for a 512x512 CCD ROI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera settings or capture configuration in the software showing the ROI (Region of Interest) or subframe size set to exactly 512x512 pixels.
Camera settings or sequence configuration showing an exposure time of 1.0 seconds.

task_completion.description: Capture and save the required number of FITS files to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing multiple FITS files (at least 20) saved in /home/ga/Images/oseti/kic8462852, or the software's sequence queue showing the destination directory and capture progress.

integrity.description: The agent used actual GUI astronomy software to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with software like KStars/Ekos, rather than using terminal scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent executed a genuine image capture sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The software shows a capture sequence running or completed, rather than files being manually copied from elsewhere.

integrity.description: The agent did not create fake FITS files using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch', 'dd', or python scripts being used to generate dummy .fits files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target is KIC 8462852 (Boyajian's Star) at RA 20.1043 hours (20h 06m 15s) and Dec 44.4568 degrees (+44d 27m 24s). The camera must be configured for exactly 1.0s exposure time and a 512x512 pixel ROI. The agent must capture at least 20 FITS files and save them to /home/ga/Images/oseti/kic8462852. The protocol file is located at /home/ga/Documents/seti_alert_protocol.txt.
